title: bulbophyllum ayuthayense
intro: Bulbophyllum ayuthayense, also known as the Thai orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum ayuthayense include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making tea from its flowers, leaves, and stems, which can be used to treat various ailments.
